description: Add Battle Frontier (Master) support with cycle-specific point rules, shadow point inheritance, generator legality enforcement, and live anchor point usage UI.

userStories.title: Add Battle Frontier Master cycle points CSV
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the Battle Frontier Master cycle point table stored in a checked-in CSV so future cycles can be updated without changing rule logic.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a checked-in CSV file under data/ for Battle Frontier Master cycle point values
The CSV uses canonical internal Pokemon identifiers that match project data
The CSV includes all point-listed species for this cycle
The CSV format is simple enough to update next cycle without code changes
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add Battle Frontier Master rules helper
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a reusable rules module for points and Mega detection so API, UI, and generation share one source of truth.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a helper that loads and caches the Battle Frontier Master points CSV
Point lookup works for exact listed species ids
Point lookup applies shadow inheritance from a listed base species when appropriate
Mega detection uses structured Pokemon data and existing mega tags
The helper exposes team-level legality checks for point cap, one 5-point Pokemon, and one Mega
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Validate Battle Frontier Master anchors in the API
userStories.description: As a user, I want illegal Battle Frontier Master anchor selections rejected before generation starts so I get immediate, clear feedback.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/generate-team validates Battle Frontier Master anchors against the 11-point cap
POST /api/generate-team enforces at most one 5-point Pokemon for Battle Frontier Master
POST /api/generate-team enforces at most one Mega Pokemon for Battle Frontier Master
Invalid Battle Frontier Master anchor combinations return HTTP 400 with deterministic human-readable errors
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Keep random team construction legal for Battle Frontier Master
userStories.description: As a user, I want Battle Frontier Master teams built from legal candidates so generated teams do not violate format rules during initial construction.
acceptanceCriteria: Random chromosome creation does not finalize a Battle Frontier Master team over 11 points
Random chromosome creation does not finalize a Battle Frontier Master team with more than one 5-point Pokemon
Random chromosome creation does not finalize a Battle Frontier Master team with more than one Mega Pokemon
Non-Battle Frontier Master formats keep their current initialization behavior
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Keep mutated and crossed teams legal for Battle Frontier Master
userStories.description: As a user, I want the genetic algorithm to preserve Battle Frontier Master legality after crossover and mutation so final generated teams remain tournament-legal.
acceptanceCriteria: Mutation does not keep an illegal Battle Frontier Master child
Crossover does not keep an illegal Battle Frontier Master child
Final generated Battle Frontier Master teams always satisfy point cap, one 5-point Pokemon, and one Mega rules
Non-Battle Frontier Master formats keep their current operator behavior
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Show Battle Frontier Master rule messaging in the UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want Battle Frontier Master rule messaging near team setup so I understand the current cycle constraints before generating a team.
acceptanceCriteria: When Battle Frontier Master is selected, team configuration shows concise copy describing 11 total points, at most one 5-point Pokemon, and at most one Mega Pokemon
Validation failures surface clear user-visible error messages for point cap, 5-point limit, and Mega limit
Team generation does not proceed after a Battle Frontier Master legality failure
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Show live anchor point usage for Battle Frontier Master
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see current Battle Frontier Master anchor point usage so I can build legal teams without guessing my remaining budget.
acceptanceCriteria: When battle-frontier-master is selected, the anchor UI displays current point usage in the format '(# / 11 points)'
The point usage display updates immediately when anchors are added, changed, or removed
The point usage display uses the same point-resolution rules as server-side validation, including shadow inheritance
Non-Battle Frontier Master formats do not show the Battle Frontier Master point meter
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add automated coverage for Battle Frontier Master rules
userStories.description: As a developer, I want automated tests for Battle Frontier Master legality so future data or generator changes do not break rule enforcement.
acceptanceCriteria: Add unit tests for point lookup and shadow inheritance
Add unit tests for one-Mega and one-5-point validation
Add API tests for invalid Battle Frontier Master anchor combinations
Add generator tests verifying produced Battle Frontier Master teams are legal
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
